x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Maintenance windows prevent false-positive alerts from polluting the Now Assist TSOM event correlation corpus.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_script: (function(){var gr=new GlideRecord("cmn_schedule_maintenance");gr.query();var n=gr.getRowCount();return{status:n>=5?"ready":"needs_attention",actualValue:n+" maintenance schedules defined",finding:n<5?"Only "+n+" maintenance schedules. Unscheduled maintenance generates false-positive alerts that degrade Now Assist TSOM AI correlation accuracy.":n+" maintenance schedules -- false-positive alert pollution is controlled."};})()
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Configure maintenance schedules for planned downtime. Associate with relevant CIs.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_cbf81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851ce6
sys_update_version.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[Maintenance windows prevent false-positive alerts from polluting the Now Assist TSOM event correlation corpus.]]></ai_justification><check_name>TSOM Maintenance Window Coverage</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(){var gr=new GlideRecord("cmn_schedule_maintenance");gr.query();var n=gr.getRowCount();return{status:n>=5?"ready":"needs_attention",actualValue:n+" maintenance schedules defined",finding:n<5?"Only "+n+" maintenance schedules. Unscheduled maintenance generates false-positive alerts that degrade Now Assist TSOM AI correlation accuracy.":n+" maintenance schedules -- false-positive alert pollution is controlled."};})()]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>AIOPS</module><number>CHK0000454</number><order>120</order><remediation_guidance>Configure maintenance schedules for planned downtime. Associate with relevant CIs.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:20</sys_created_on><sys_id>cbf81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851ce6</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>TSOM Maintenance Window Coverage</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_cbf81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851ce6</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:02</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
